design.theme: A domed chamber atop the fleet's highest mast, filled with brass instruments and celestial charts. The air hums with the mathematics of learning itself. An orrery on a central pedestal shows learning algorithms orbiting each other — MAML, Reptile, and meta-gradient descent tracing elliptical paths around a shared objective. Brass sextants measure the angular distance between task domains, while ephemeris charts predict transfer learning trajectories. Star catalogs preserve frozen pre-trained weights as navigational waypoints. This is where agents learn HOW to learn — the art of rapid adaptation to unseen waters.
design.ml_concept: Meta-Learning / Learning to Learn — Few-shot adaptation, MAML, Reptile, task transfer, inductive bias optimization, hypergradient computation, and the meta-optimization of learning algorithms themselves.
